claim_bullets.bullet_text: The Carpenter's solution explores lazy versus eager evaluation and iterator performance (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.269-270).
The Carpenter's code is not meant for production, but illustrates a conversation starter (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.269-270).
The interview leads to a job offer from a stealth startup, FOG (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.269-270).

source_record_text: Chapter on the aftermath of a coding interview scenario in 'JavaScript Allongé'
